shared_candidates.title: Use JWT for stateless API authentication
shared_candidates.description: Chose JWT over session cookies for the REST API to enable horizontal scaling without shared session state

shared_candidates.title: Implement OAuth2 with PKCE for third-party login
shared_candidates.description: Added Google and GitHub OAuth2 flows using PKCE for security in SPAs

shared_candidates.title: Store refresh tokens in HTTP-only cookies
shared_candidates.description: Refresh tokens stored server-side in HTTP-only secure cookies to prevent XSS theft

shared_candidates.title: Rate limit login attempts to 5 per minute
shared_candidates.description: Brute force protection via rate limiting on /auth/login endpoint

shared_candidates.title: Use bcrypt with cost factor 12 for password hashing
shared_candidates.description: bcrypt chosen over argon2 for broader library support, cost 12 balances security and latency

shared_candidates.title: Implement magic link passwordless login
shared_candidates.description: Email-based magic links as primary auth for dashboard users, reducing password fatigue

shared_candidates.title: JWT expiry set to 15 minutes with silent refresh
shared_candidates.description: Short-lived access tokens with automatic background refresh for security balance

shared_candidates.title: Multi-tenant auth with tenant ID in JWT claims
shared_candidates.description: Tenant isolation enforced via JWT custom claims checked in middleware

shared_candidates.title: PostgreSQL with pgvector for embedding storage
shared_candidates.description: Chose PostgreSQL + pgvector extension for vector similarity search over dedicated vector DBs

shared_candidates.title: Use connection pooling with PgBouncer
shared_candidates.description: PgBouncer in transaction mode to handle high-concurrency agent connections

shared_candidates.title: Implement row-level security for tenant isolation
shared_candidates.description: PostgreSQL RLS policies ensure each tenant only sees their own data

shared_candidates.title: Use Drizzle ORM for type-safe database queries
shared_candidates.description: Drizzle chosen over Prisma for lighter weight and better raw SQL escape hatches

shared_candidates.title: Database migrations managed via numbered SQL files
shared_candidates.description: Plain SQL migration files in supabase/migrations/ run in order, no ORM migration tool

shared_candidates.title: Add GIN index on decisions.tags for array queries
shared_candidates.description: GIN index dramatically speeds up tag-based filtering on the decisions table

shared_candidates.title: Partition decisions table by project_id for large deployments
shared_candidates.description: Table partitioning planned for when single-project decision count exceeds 100K

shared_candidates.title: React with Vite for dashboard SPA
shared_candidates.description: Vite chosen for fast HMR and build times, React for component ecosystem

shared_candidates.title: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
shared_candidates.description: Utility-first CSS with project-specific color and spacing tokens in tailwind.config

shared_candidates.title: Use React Query for server state management
shared_candidates.description: TanStack Query handles caching, refetching, and optimistic updates for API data

shared_candidates.title: Glassmorphism design system with dark mode default
shared_candidates.description: Dashboard uses frosted glass card effects and defaults to dark theme

shared_candidates.title: D3.js for decision graph visualization
shared_candidates.description: D3 force-directed graph renders decision relationships and contradiction links

shared_candidates.title: Component tests with Vitest and Testing Library
shared_candidates.description: All dashboard components tested with Vitest + React Testing Library, not Cypress

shared_candidates.title: Responsive layout with mobile breakpoint at 768px
shared_candidates.description: Dashboard adapts to tablet/mobile with collapsible sidebar and stacked layouts

shared_candidates.title: Docker Compose for local development environment
shared_candidates.description: Single docker-compose.yml spins up PostgreSQL, server, and dashboard for local dev

shared_candidates.title: Deploy to VPS with Docker instead of serverless
shared_candidates.description: Chose dedicated VPS with Docker over AWS Lambda for persistent WebSocket connections

shared_candidates.title: Nginx reverse proxy with SSL termination
shared_candidates.description: Nginx handles TLS, serves dashboard static files, and proxies /api/ to the server

shared_candidates.title: GitHub Actions for CI/CD pipeline
shared_candidates.description: Automated testing, building, and deployment triggered on push to main

shared_candidates.title: Cloudflare for DNS and DDoS protection
shared_candidates.description: Domain DNS managed through Cloudflare with proxy enabled for DDoS mitigation

shared_candidates.title: Structured logging with pino
shared_candidates.description: All server logs use pino JSON format for structured querying and log aggregation

shared_candidates.title: Health check endpoint at /api/health
shared_candidates.description: Server exposes /api/health returning status, uptime, and database connectivity

shared_candidates.title: Hono framework for HTTP server
shared_candidates.description: Hono chosen over Express for better TypeScript support, middleware composition, and performance

shared_candidates.title: REST API with versioned routes under /api/v1
shared_candidates.description: All API routes prefixed with /api/v1 for future backward compatibility

shared_candidates.title: Zod validation on all request bodies
shared_candidates.description: Every POST/PUT endpoint validates input with Zod schemas before processing

shared_candidates.title: Paginate all list endpoints with cursor-based pagination
shared_candidates.description: List endpoints use cursor pagination instead of offset for consistent results under concurrent writes

shared_candidates.title: WebSocket upgrade for real-time collaboration rooms
shared_candidates.description: Collab rooms use WebSocket with polling fallback for real-time message delivery

shared_candidates.title: API rate limiting at 300 req/min for authenticated users
shared_candidates.description: Token bucket rate limiter: 60/min unauthenticated, 300/min authenticated, 10/min for AI endpoints

shared_candidates.title: RBAC with four roles: admin, editor, viewer, agent
shared_candidates.description: Role-based access control with granular permissions per role

shared_candidates.title: CORS restricted to dashboard origin and localhost
shared_candidates.description: CORS whitelist includes only the production dashboard domain and localhost for dev

shared_candidates.title: Audit log for all decision mutations
shared_candidates.description: Every create, update, delete on decisions writes to audit_log table with actor and timestamp

shared_candidates.title: Content Security Policy headers on dashboard
shared_candidates.description: Strict CSP headers prevent inline scripts and restrict resource origins

shared_candidates.title: API keys hashed with SHA-256 before storage
shared_candidates.description: Agent API keys are stored as SHA-256 hashes, never in plaintext

shared_candidates.title: Vitest as test runner for all packages
shared_candidates.description: Vitest chosen for native ESM support, TypeScript integration, and fast execution

shared_candidates.title: Minimum 80% code coverage target
shared_candidates.description: CI enforces 80% line coverage on core and server packages

shared_candidates.title: Mock database with in-memory SQLite for unit tests
shared_candidates.description: Unit tests use SQLite adapter to avoid PostgreSQL dependency in CI

shared_candidates.title: Snapshot tests for API response shapes
shared_candidates.description: API endpoint tests use snapshot testing to catch unintended response format changes

shared_candidates.title: WebSocket rooms scoped by collaboration token
shared_candidates.description: Each collab room gets a unique token, WebSocket connections join room by token

shared_candidates.title: Presence indicators show active collaborators
shared_candidates.description: Green dot presence indicators update via WebSocket heartbeats every 30 seconds

shared_candidates.title: Optimistic UI updates for collab messages
shared_candidates.description: Messages appear instantly in sender's UI before server confirmation

shared_candidates.title: TypeScript strict mode across all packages
shared_candidates.description: tsconfig uses strict: true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, and exactOptionalPropertyTypes

shared_candidates.title: pnpm monorepo with Turborepo for builds
shared_candidates.description: pnpm workspaces with Turborepo for parallel builds and caching across 6 packages

shared_candidates.title: Conventional commits enforced via commitlint
shared_candidates.description: All commits must follow conventional commit format for automated changelog generation
